profile.name: 2020 Bulkers Ltd
profile.about: 2020 Bulkers Ltd. is a Bermuda-incorporated, Oslo-operated owner and operator of large dry bulk vessels. The company focuses on the Newcastlemax segment — scrubber-fitted 208,000 DWT carriers — and transports dry bulk commodities including iron ore, coal, and grain across Asia, Africa, and South America. Founded in 2017 by Norwegian shipping entrepreneur Magnus Halvorsen, 2020 Bulkers listed on Oslo Børs in 2018 and built a fleet of eight eco-efficient Newcastlemax vessels. The company is backed by prominent Norwegian shipping investor Tor Olav Troim. In 2024–2025 the company executed a fleet divestment strategy, selling vessels and returning capital to shareholders through special dividends.

people.name: Lars-Christian Svensen
people.title: Chief Executive Officer
people.bio: Appointed CEO April 1, 2025. Previously CCO from Sept 2024. Former CEO of Golden Ocean Management AS.

people.name: Vidar Hasund
people.title: Chief Financial Officer
people.bio: CFO since January 1, 2019. Also Contracted CFO of Himalaya Shipping. Background includes Borr Drilling, PGS, and KPMG.

people.name: Christian Dahll
people.title: Chief Operating Officer
people.bio: COO since January 2022. Joined 2020 Bulkers in January 2020 as Head of Commercial Operations. Former Höegh Autoliners.

keyFacts.label: Fuel
keyFacts.value: All vessels are LNG dual-fuel capable

keyFacts.label: Tax
keyFacts.value: Transferred tax domicile from Bermuda to Norway in August 2022

keyFacts.label: Ownership
keyFacts.value: Backed by Tor Olav Troim (Golar LNG, Borr Drilling, Himalaya Shipping)

keyFacts.label: Management
keyFacts.value: Sold 40% of 2020 Bulkers Management AS to Himalaya Shipping (Aug 2024)

keyFacts.label: Strategy
keyFacts.value: Completed full fleet divestment by early 2026; capital return via special dividends
